lenses.guidance: vv 1-7 build the bronze altar; v 8 builds the bronze laver. Both bronze, both at the courtyard threshold. The pattern is fixed: sacrifice precedes cleansing precedes approach to the holy. The order of grace, not of human achievement.

vv 21-31's materials inventory functions as a narrative ledger — Bezalel's craft audited by name, by weight, by who-paid-what. The structure asserts that sacred construction can be counted, and ought to be.
